title: Integers
learningOutcomes: Represent integers on a number line.

objectives.text: Locate negative integers on the number line.

theory: Integers include all natural numbers, their negative counterparts, and zero.
hints: Explore the negative side of the number line by dragging points to the left of zero.

tasks.instruction: Move the point to a negative integer.

keyConcepts: Negative integers are located to the left of zero.
